mobileDescription: Take the full power of MetaTrader 5 with you on iOS and Android. Trade forex, commodities, indices, and cryptocurrencies from anywhere in the world.
interactiveChartsDesc: Interactive charts with 30+ indicators and drawing tools
allInstrumentsDesc: Trade forex, metals, commodities, indices, and crypto
priceAlertsDesc: Set notifications for price levels and market events
realTimeQuotesDesc: Live streaming quotes with spread monitoring
inAppChatDesc: Direct support from our expert team within the app
tradingHistoryDesc: Complete access to your account history and reports
instantDepositsDesc: Fund your account directly from the app
oneTapTradingDesc: Quick trade mode for fast order execution
iosOptimizedDesc: Optimized for iPhone and iPad with full support for Retina displays
androidOptimizedDesc: Designed for Android devices with Material Design 3
downloadApp: Download the app and trade 200+ instruments 24/5 from anywhere
